page_content:
After the Schedule Adjustment Period . . . .0% refund

*Courses taken through the Maryland English Institute (MEI) are not considered in even exchange calculations.

After day five of schedule adjustment through the end of the schedule adjustment: If a full- time undergraduate drops a course or courses thereby changing the total number of credits

For Summer, Winter, 12-week terms, and non- standard courses, view the associated calendar found at registrar.umd.edu/calendars for the no charge drop period deadlines.
